title: TableShift Tabular Distribution Shift Benchmark

data_urls.access_notes: Repository documents public and credentialed benchmark datasets.

instructions: Use public TableShift tasks by default; only use credentialed tasks when the user has authorized access.
Record experiment identifier, split variable, feature coding, and upstream data source.
Treat official shifted splits as operating points and construct continuous feature/domain support curves when possible.

scale.download_size: mostly lightweight to moderate; some tasks require manual credentialed access

recommended_axes.name: domain_label_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Site, year, region, hospital, survey, or data-source support, depending on task.

recommended_axes.name: feature_distribution_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Nearest-neighbor or density support in train-fitted tabular feature space.

recommended_axes.name: subgroup_support
recommended_axes.definition: Intersectional subgroup support for clinically or socially meaningful covariates.

useful_for: Auditing site, time, population, and domain shifts in tabular settings.
Building lightweight operating-point versus full-curve examples.
leakage_risks: Some public variables may encode the split variable too directly.
Protected or sensitive attributes require careful reporting and user authorization.
Manual credentialed tasks should not be assumed available.
